title: Largest ever deployment of RAF Poseidon Maritime Aircraft supporting NATO in Iceland

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content: Largest ever deployment of RAF Poseidon Maritime Aircraft supporting NATO in Iceland. P-8A Poseidon aircraft from 120 Squadron, based at RAF Lossiemouth, Scotland, deployed 3 of its P-8A Fleet to Keflavik Air Base in Iceland –...

sourceReferences.citationText: serper-scottish-aviation – Largest ever deployment of RAF Poseidon Maritime Aircraft supporting NATO in Iceland
